since_last: 46% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.78%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 46% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.48% · BTC -0.47% · Gold -0.30% · Nasdaq100 -0.10%. 46% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.78%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.78%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.11%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +8.56%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +8.56%, VRT +8.18%, MRVL +7.51%, SMR +6.72%, AMAT +6.27%. Laggards: SNAP -4.75%, META -4.30%, APP -4.30%, AI -3.39%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.96% at $197.85
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
